title: T-035 — Expiry calc on GRN ingest (WH §12.1)
prompt:
# T-035 — Expiry calc on GRN ingest (WH §12.1)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §12.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `computeExpiry({grn_item, product})` helper: if grn_items.expiry_date provided use it; else `manufacture_date + product.shelf_life_days`. Also computes `date_code_rendered` per product.date_code_format (03§9.2).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/expiry-calc.ts`: `computeExpiry({manufacture_date, explicit_expiry, product: {shelf_life_days, date_code_format}}): {expiry_date, date_code_rendered}`.
2. Supported date_code formats: YYWW, YYYY-MM-DD, JJWW (Julian week), YYJJJ (Julian day-of-year).
3. Called by T-021/T-022 GRN services on LP creation.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/expiry-calc.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/expiry-calc.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given manufacture_date=2026-04-10 and shelf_life_days=180, when computed, then expiry_date=2026-10-07.
2. Given explicit_expiry='2026-12-01', when computed, then expiry_date=2026-12-01 (override).
3. Given date_code_format='YYWW' and manufacture 2026-04-10, when computed, then date_code_rendered='2615' (week 15).
4. Given date_code_format='YYJJJ' and manufacture 2026-04-10, when computed, then date_code_rendered='26100' (DOY 100).

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/expiry-calc.test.ts` covering each format + override.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test expiry-calc`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute expiry from current date (must be manufacture_date based).
- Do not silently drop unsupported date_code_format — throw with clear error.
